creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 143949
Log of build failure for teTex-Base

I am attempting to rebuild print/teTeX-base on my system.
FreeBSD rogue.local 10.0-STABLE FreeBSD 10.0-STABLE #1 r267116M: Thu Jun  5 09:00:40 PDT 2014     root@rogue.local:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/VT  amd64

It fails claiming that my version of gcc will not accept varargs. Of course, it is clang, not gcc. the only version of gcc I have is 4.7, but it is not being used in this build.

Any way I can get it to proceed?

I am attaching the log of the build.
